info.title: Work Order Execution Service Quote Segments API
info.description: Manage service quote segments, checklists, jobs, and parts in the Work Order Execution microservice.

servers.description: Sandbox (Expert App API — work order microservice)

OAuth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Use the authorization code flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the client credentials grant for machine-to-machine access. The `axiom` scope is required unless your product documentation states otherwise.

JsonPayload.description: JSON request or response body; shape depends on the operation.

get.description: View all segments for a service quote. Optional `groupby=serviceArea`. Optional `notificationType=PARTS_ONLY_SUMMARY` for parts-only email.

post.description: Create a new segment on a service quote.

post.summary: Add ad hoc segment to service quote
post.description: Add an ad hoc job segment to a service quote.

post.summary: Add segment by checklist or jobs
post.description: Add a segment from Expert Services checklist ID or job IDs.

get.summary: Get segment grouped by service area
get.description: View a segment related to a service quote with service-area grouping.

get.summary: List segments grouped by service area
get.description: View all segments for a service quote grouped by service area.

put.summary: Parts-only email for service quote segments
put.description: Send parts-only email notification for segments.
Update a segment related to a service quote.

delete.description: Delete a segment related to a service quote.

patch.description: Update specific properties of a segment.

post.summary: Add checklist by ID to segment
post.description: Create and add a checklist to a segment using an Expert Services checklist ID.

post.summary: Ad hoc job on checklist (service quote)
post.description: Create an ad hoc job in Expert Services and add it to the checklist.

post.summary: Add Expert Services job to checklist
post.description: Add a published Expert Services job to a checklist on a segment.

get.description: Get a part by ID for a checklist task on a service quote.

put.description: Update a part by ID on a checklist task.

delete.description: Delete a part by ID on a checklist task.

patch.description: Patch a part by ID on a checklist task.

get.description: Get all parts on the service estimate job (checklist task path).

put.summary: Put parts array (service quote checklist task)
put.description: Replace parts using a part array.

post.description: Create a new part on the job.

get.summary: Get checklist on service quote segment
get.description: View a checklist inside a segment for a service quote.

post.description: Create and add a checklist to a segment. Use query `type=byId` with Expert Services checklist ID in body.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: When `byId`, body references Expert Services checklist identifier.

get.summary: List jobs on service quote segment
get.description: View all jobs inside a segment for a service quote.

get.summary: Get job on service quote segment
get.description: View a job inside a segment for a service quote.

put.summary: Update job on service quote segment
put.description: Update a job inside a segment for a service quote.

patch.summary: Patch job on service quote segment
patch.description: Update specific properties of a job.

get.description: Get a part by ID on a service quote segment job.

put.description: Update a part by ID on a segment job.

delete.description: Delete a part by ID on a segment job.

patch.description: Patch a part by ID on a segment job.

get.description: Get all parts on the service estimate job.

put.summary: Put parts array (service quote job path)
put.description: Replace parts using a part array.

post.description: Create a new part on the job.
